assertions.description: Multi-unit BAV70W and BAV70W pairs counted correctly by de-duplicating unit-2 entries. BOM grouping by value+footprint is accurate.
All 4 power rails found. Decoupling correctly identifies 8 bypass caps on +5V (0.8uF total). Correctly notes no bulk capacitance.

The column driver uses 8 TPIC6B595 power shift registers chained via RC_DATA, RC_SHIFT_CLK, COL_REG_CLK, and ~RC_CLEAR signals. These form a classic daisy-chain shift register bus (similar to SPI). The bus_analysis.spi and signal_analysis sections are both empty — the analyzer failed to identify this shift register topology. TPIC6B595 is a common power shift register and the net names are unambiguous.

4x TBD62783 (Toshiba 7-ch sink driver, rated 50V) are present but subcircuit descriptions are empty strings. The +24V rail supplies the flip-dot coils. No high-voltage driver or open-drain driver topology is noted anywhere in the output.
